pi_items.source: Task specification is defective; setup_task.ps1 is completely missing, so the DXF file is never created.
Export file path requirement explicitly matches the prompt description and verifier.py logic.
Project save path requirement explicitly matches the prompt description and verifier.py logic.
Task specification is defective; setup_task.ps1 is completely missing, so the ground truth JSON is never generated.
verifier.py strictly enforces these 6 elevations during Z-value distribution checks.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, meaning the necessary synthetic files legacy_contours.dxf and ground_truth.json are never generated. This breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file and copy the non-existent ground truth. Despite this, the target directory structure requirements and target elevations (1600-1625) explicitly match the prompt description.
